name: NVIDIA
description: GPU computing and AI platforms. Partners with Siemens on the industrial metaverse: NVIDIA Omniverse integrated with Siemens Xcelerator for photorealistic, physics-based digital twins of factories and products.

name: AWS (Amazon Web Services)
description: Cloud infrastructure provider. Siemens delivers Xcelerator as a Service and Insights Hub industrial IoT workloads on AWS; joint go-to-market for cloud PLM and manufacturing analytics.

name: Microsoft
description: Cloud (Azure) and productivity software. Teamcenter integrates with Microsoft Teams and Azure OpenAI for industrial AI copilots; Azure hosts Siemens cloud offerings.

name: SAP
description: Enterprise ERP software. Long-standing integration partner: Teamcenter PLM connected to SAP ERP/S4HANA so engineering BOMs flow into manufacturing, procurement and finance processes.

name: IBM
description: Enterprise software and services. Collaboration around service lifecycle management and systems engineering, connecting IBM's asset management (Maximo) with Siemens Xcelerator.

name: Sony
description: Consumer electronics and imaging. Partnered with Siemens on an immersive engineering solution: NX combined with Sony's XR head-mounted display for immersive product design.

name: Zel X / startup ecosystem examples
description: Illustrative placeholder for smaller technology partners: niche simulation, AI quality inspection, robotics orchestration and IIoT-sensor startups that integrate with Xcelerator via APIs and are validated through pilots and POCs.
